query:
SELECT p.id, p.userId, p.name as partner_name, p.phone as partner_phone,
       u.name as user_name, u.phone as user_phone, u.roles,
       COUNT(pc.id) as city_count,
       GROUP_CONCAT(c.name) as cities
FROM partners p
INNER JOIN users u ON p.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN partner_cities pc ON p.id = pc.partnerId AND pc.contractStatus = 'active'
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE p.isActive = 1 AND u.isActive = 1
GROUP BY p.id, p.userId, p.name, p.phone, u.name, u.phone, u.roles
ORDER BY p.id;

       u.name as user_name, u.phone as user_phone, u.roles,
       COUNT(pc.id) as city_count,
       GROUP_CONCAT(c.name) as cities
FROM partners p
INNER JOIN users u ON p.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN partner_cities pc ON p.id = pc.partnerId AND pc.contractStatus = 'active'
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE p.isActive = 1 AND u.isActive = 1
GROUP BY p.id, p.userId, p.name, p.phone, u.name, u.phone, u.roles
ORDER BY p.id;
